---
title: "Photos"
toc: false
page-layout: full
lightbox: true
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* Stretch the photo grids to (nearly) full viewport width */
#quarto-document-content .quarto-layout-panel {
  width: 96vw;
  max-width: none;
  position: relative;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
}
</style>
```

A few photos I've taken of American life.

## 2026

::: {layout-ncol=3}
![On a "Stranger Things" tour in Jackson, Georgia.](../media/photos/aep-dsc04428.jpg){group="2026"}

![A bar advertising "Husband Day Care" in Jackson, GA.](../media/photos/aep-dsc04481.jpg){group="2026"}

![Packing summertime lunches at a Methodist church in Jackson, GA.](../media/photos/aep-dsc04523.jpg){group="2026"}

![Writing cards for the elderly at the same church.](../media/photos/aep-dsc04536.jpg){group="2026"}

![Free Prayer in the square of Covington, GA. Also where "The Vampire Diaries" and several clips from movies were filmed.](../media/photos/aep-dsc04556.jpg){group="2026"}

![Learning how to shoot in Jackson, GA (with experienced and safe instructors).](../media/photos/aep-jackson-shooting.jpg){group="2026"}
:::

## 2025

::: {layout-ncol=3}
![A truck photographed in Rehobeth Beach, Delaware in 2025.](../media/photos/political-car.jpg){group="2025"}

![Photographed in Lee's Legendary Marbles and Collectables in York, Nebraska on my drive out to Berkeley.](../media/photos/dsc03544-2.jpg){group="2025"}

![Photographed in Rehobeth Beach, DE in 2025, a few "Gulf of America" t-shirts for sale on the boardwalk.](../media/photos/img_5316.jpg){group="2025"}
:::
